ITEM 13. CERTAIN RELATIONSHIPS AND RELATED TRANSACTIONS AND DIRECTOR INDEPENDENCE
The information required by Items 404 and 407(a) of Regulation S-K is included under “Stock Ownership Information - Transactions with Related Persons” and “Corporate Governance - Individual Board Skills Matrix - Director Independence” in the definitive Proxy Statement for our [DATE_TIME] Annual Meeting of Shareholders and is incorporated herein by reference.
ITEM 14.
